content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post iter-004)

## HIGH — actionable cleanup (audit004, genuinely new)
- **Delete the dead `base_change_mate_*` apparatus' false documentation.** `base_change_mate_gstar_transpose`
  (FlatBaseChange.lean ~1460) holds a sorry body (~105 lines) whose narrative cites THREE non-existent
  "proved" lemmas (`base_change_mate_unit_value`, `base_change_mate_fstar_reindex_legs_unitExpand`,
  `base_change_mate_extendScalars_inner_value_counit`) and an out-of-bounds `@~1999` pointer (file is 1666
  lines). Plus dead stacked `set_option maxHeartbeats 4000000 in` on a `/-!` comment (lines 1312-1315) and
  4 `/-!` "Seam 2/3" planning blocks describing lemmas that were never written. The mate route is DEAD /
  off-path (memory + iter-002 leandag: 0 mate riders on goal closure). **Action:** dispatch the `refactor`
  subagent to delete the dead mate decls (`base_change_mate_gstar_transpose`, and the off-path
  `affineBaseChange_pushforward_iso`/`flatBaseChange_pushforward_isIso` if confirmed rider-only) + their
  stale `/-!` blocks and false-doc comments. This is the SAME issue audit003 flagged (stale cross-refs in
  this sorry comment); it has now compounded. NOT a prover task. Confirm via `dag-query ancestors` that the
  current goal closure (`baseChangeGammaPullbackEquiv`) does not transit these before deleting.

## HIGH — closest-to-completion live targets
- **FBC `pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_natural`** (the ONLY live FBC sorry on-path; host already
  closed). Route validated end-to-end at the head (4-step transpose reduction compiles). **Do NOT
  re-dispatch the monolith** — pc004 already flagged FBC CHURNING. Instead **effort-breaker** the tail
  into two sub-lemmas: (i) unit-prefix cancellation + re-bundle for the 2nd/3rd `homEquiv` peels
  (mechanical); (ii) the per-leg identification of each `pullback_spec_tilde_iso` transpose with
  `gammaPushforwardNatIso` via `CategoryTheory.unit_conjugateEquiv` + `Adjunction.comp` unfolding of the
  composite `adjL` (the deep conjugate identity, the real risk). Useful verified-to-exist Mathlib lemmas:
  `unit_conjugateEquiv`, `conjugateEquiv_counit`, `conjugateEquiv_mateEquiv_vcomp`,
  `Scheme.Modules.conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv`, `ModuleCat.extendScalarsComp`,
  `extendRestrictScalarsAdj` (+`_unit_app_apply`, `_counit_app_apply_one_tmul`).

## HIGH — SNAP bridge lemmas (the gate on all 6 SNAP sorries)
- The LocalizedMonoidal foundation is now in place + axiom-clean. The 6 residual sorries are ALL gated on
  the 4 bridge lemmas (`tensorObjAssoc_eq_localizedAssociator`, `tensorBraiding_eq_localizedBraiding`,
  `tensorObjUnitIso_eq_localizedLeftUnitor`, `tensorObjRightUnitor_eq_localizedRightUnitor`). **Action:**
  dispatch a `mathlib-build`/`prove` lane to build the 4 bridges (Option B), using the μ-transport
  (`tensorObj F G = L(F.toPr ⊗_p G.toPr) ≅(μ.symm) L(F.toPr) ⊗_loc L(G.toPr) ≅ F ⊗_loc G`) with Mathlib
  components `Localization.Monoidal.{associator_hom_app, leftUnitor_hom_app, rightUnitor_hom_app, μ,
  braidingNatIso_hom_app, μ_natural_left/right}`. Then close the 6 coherences by `rw` hand-built→localized
  + `MonoidalCategory.pentagon`/`triangle`/`BraidedCategory.hexagon`. **Reversal signal (per sc004/plan):
  if μ-transport is friction-heavy, fall back to Option A** (rewire the hand-built `tensorObj`/`tensorObjAssoc`
  defs directly onto the synonym's ⊗ — a `refactor`, explicitly out of a prove lane).
- **Blueprint gap (snap004 minor):** before that prover lane, have a `blueprint-writer` (a) flesh the
  4 bridge-lemma proof sketches to name the localized braiding/unitor component formulas (currently only
  `associator_hom_app` is cited), and (b) author blocks for the `sectionsMul`-whiskering naturality bricks
  that `sectionsMul_mul_assoc` needs. HARD GATE: these chapters feed the next SNAP prover lane.

## MEDIUM — documentation hygiene (audit004 major; prover-actionable, not blocking)
- Transitive-sorry-without-disclosure: graded-ring instances `instGMonoid`→`instGSemiring`→
  `instGCommSemiring`→`sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring` (SectionGradedRing.lean ~2125-2185) and the two
  delegating decls `pullback_spec_tilde_iso_restriction_naturality` (FlatBaseChange ~1261) /
  `baseChangeEqLocusToPullbackGamma`+`baseChangeGammaPullbackEquiv` (Global) are presented as complete
  with no docstring warning. Contrast the positive practice in `base_change_mate_section_identity` /
  `pushforward_base_change_mate_cancelBaseChange` which disclose. Ask the next prover to add a one-line
  transitive-sorry disclosure when it touches these files.

## Coverage debt (dag-query unmatched = 68 `lean_aux`, all proved/private)
- 60 pre-existing private helpers (RelativeTensorCoequalizer.*, W_*, uMod*, etc.) correctly out-of-scope
  per the "mark private to leave the scan" doctrine.
- ~8 NEW this iter, all private/helper (no blueprint obligation per the doctrine): `Wsheaf`,
  `pshModMonoidal`/`pshModBraided`/`pshModSymmetric`, `isMonoidal_of_braided_whiskerRight`,
  `braiding_unit_unit`, `tensorBraiding_unitModule`, `tensorBraiding_symm`, plus `sheafificationCounitIso`,
  `opensTopology`, `MonoidalPresheaf` (infra). The 3 non-private SNAP additions (`W_isMonoidal`,
  `localizedMonoidalUnitIso`, `modulesLocalizedMonoidal`) already have authored blocks. No new blueprint
  authoring required for coverage.

## Blocked — do NOT re-assign without a structural change
- `pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_natural` as a monolith (CHURNING signal; effort-break first — see
  HIGH above).
- The dead `base_change_mate_*` route — NEVER dispatch a prover at it (memory: MATE route DEAD). Delete
  via refactor, do not prove.
- SNAP coherences as direct hand-proofs of Mac Lane laws (STUCK ≥3 iters before the pivot) — only via the
  bridge lemmas now.
